title: hpc-wrap-entry-point skill return envelope
description: Return envelope written by the hpc-wrap-entry-point sub-skill at <experiment_dir>/.hpc/_returns/hpc-wrap-entry-point.json. Read by the parent skill (hpc-submit / hpc-campaign) after the Skill tool returns. oneOf [Success, Error]; the Error shape mirrors hpc_agent/schemas/envelope.json ErrorEnvelope.

wrapper_path.description: Path to the materialized wrapper at .hpc/wrappers/<run_name>.py. Present on the shell_command (3b) path; null on the register_run (3a) direct-decoration path.

files_edited.description: Files the skill edited on disk (e.g. the user's entry-point file on the direct-decoration path). Empty array on the wrapper path.
